name: futsmandu-backend
description: Futsmandu monorepo — Player API + Owner API + Admin API (three independent NestJS + Fastify servers)

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build:packages
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; find . -name 'dist' -type d -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; find . -name '*.log' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -delete ; echo 'Clean complete. Run npm run setup to reinstall.'
scripts.fresh: npm run clean && npm run setup
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@futsmandu/types && npm run build --workspace=@futsmandu/utils && npm run build --workspace=@futsmandu/logger && npm run build --workspace=@futsmandu/database && npm run build --workspace=@futsmandu/redis && npm run build --workspace=@futsmandu/queues && npm run build --workspace=@futsmandu/auth
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:player && npm run build:owner && npm run build:admin
scripts.start:dev: npx concurrently --prefix-colors "green,yellow,blue" --names "PLAYER,OWNER,ADMIN" "npm run dev:player" "npm run dev:owner" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.start:worker: npx concurrently --prefix-colors "green,yellow,blue" --names "PLAYER-W,OWNER-W,ADMIN-W" "npm run dev:worker:player" "npm run dev:worker:owner" "npm run dev:worker:admin"
scripts.start:all: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --names "API,WORKER" "npm run start:dev" "npm run start:worker"
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run start --workspace=apps/player-api" "npm run start --workspace=apps/owner-api" "npm run start --workspace=apps/admin-api"
scripts.start:worker:prod: npx concurrently "npm run start:worker --workspace=apps/player-api" "npm run start:worker --workspace=apps/owner-api" "npm run start:worker --workspace=apps/admin-api"
scripts.start:all:prod: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --names "API,WORKER" "npm run start" "npm run start:worker:prod"
scripts.docker:build:retry: sh -c 'docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml build || (echo "Build failed. Retrying once in 10s..." && sleep 10 && docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml build)'
scripts.docker:up:retry: sh -c 'docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml up --build -d || (echo "Up failed. Retrying once in 10s..." && sleep 10 && docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml up --build -d)'
scripts.docker:save: docker save -o futsmandu-images.tar futsmandu-3-player-api futsmandu-3-owner-api futsmandu-3-admin-api futsmandu-3-player-worker futsmandu-3-owner-worker futsmandu-3-admin-worker nginx:1.25-alpine redis:7.2-alpine
